textByHash.19a06ce287d0be94a553df1d2ce49d29982ec750: Yes, Darve, I can see who it is. Let it be known, Surok, that I am not one of your minions. I will not bow down to your attempts to intimidate me.
textByHash.51c68c66cd76c988941e56c1a0df373f03d94899: As for my progress, you can tell Lucien that the investigations would be greatly expedited if I weren't subject to all these interruptions!
textByHash.cdd06b300771df608ca99a3dc444ab5012e0a818: Hmph. Very well. Given you have read my research, and given Lucien himself sent you, I trust you know what it is I seek.
textByHash.fc634542d2240bfd9991b1bf61d54dda5cb508af: Even with all that I know, I can still scarcely even imagine it! A power beyond even the gods themselves!
textByHash.d8a79332f9188a190d2088cd1e8df2bb6e68441b: Oh, but I believe I have found it. More than that, I believe we are stood right above it.
textByHash.fe9ab37f6b99cfaa3903c927e5a60357110d074b: That's precisely what I mean. Perhaps now you see the issue that I face. Reaching the bottom will require a significant amount of effort.
textByHash.efc926cd567341b399d12455e62e4c3033d3f46c: I attempted to recruit some goblins to find a way down, but they proved... inadequate. I fear a gantry will need building, which will not be a quick process.
textByHash.3b809d9960a442e7326d40657108f61e40124a8b: I don't think so... though I suppose they are rather unique. Perhaps I shall study their movements at some point.
textByHash.6fb801260d77484c0ed437e8409dc3d122690268: Shut up, Darve! The adults are talking!
textByHash.94c71031818dbc72dde4059851989019f424c612: Did you ever manage to get them to go downwards? To the bottom?
textByHash.28101092a4ec9d737494c5c27d94615cd55b9a57: Hmm, intriguing! I know of a light spell which might work. If you were to use your lantern to call a creature, I could try and use my spell to send it down to the bottom of the chasm!
textByHash.985ce7491c6b008d1d5979a393cdc719d9ecadac: However, that does then pose a problem.
textByHash.067e779ccae2533d8910c0dba3f4aa16f052ad44: Well it would mean you'd be going down first! After all this work, do you really think I'm just going to let you get your hands all over my finds?
textByHash.1e4f1625369e8b8d306caed68d0e4d4c3c0e0139: Okay, fine! Given I have no choice, when you're ready to go down, just attract a light creature. Once you're in position, I'll use my light spell.
textByHash.a633cbd0e5d4be2f6df5c676594ec28d79c79fae: Then be gone, before I set Darve on you!
textByHash.e164ba75d45b997677184cfd7f0dd062b23ffa91: Ah, so you've returned. Ready to take your trip to the bottom yet?
textByHash.0dcbf1e07f8b96831f2064295bb0db73de9bd8a8: Just attract one of the light creatures using one of those lanterns you were talking about. When you're in position, I'll use my light spell to send you down to the bottom of the chasm.
textByHash.c049c3fa0c03092c660f5a5b1d7d229a29306d16: If you don't like him, be glad you've never met Lucien.
textByHash.49bc2159a1fd9a430639c8bce6ccc5fb217cc1d2: Goblin! What did I tell you about what we're doing here?
textByHash.80641e0f3047cce6805ddbfaf7f725faa838cd5b: You've returned! What news of the bottom? What's down there?
textByHash.a3f8ae7bb2886ab4a2f7c3b45e1d759d573d3b78: Well then let me help! Tell me, how do we summon the light creatures? I made one of those blue lanterns, but they still don't seem to come!
textByHash.c8275cd10edb0fab5b39140ca857857441af6050: It seems highly unlikely that a snake has that capability. That thing is nothing more than a bloated earth worm! Now silence, Darve!
textByHash.e1cc6aa754884b5ecb519c5ef2f9704287688ec0: As for you, what can you tell me about the chasm?
textByHash.11e1d195bbc906c56a82de4ace78ef934726151c: The impertinence! I'll ask these same questions until I get the answers I need! Now tell me, what's down there?
textByHash.d79bb675de9fd3d8056b05f04f9a60beb751a20f: The Stone! After all this time... I've finally found it!
textByHash.a78d71206959b3c616ff0e4de2ac2736990024bf: Yes, quite a clever ploy, , but you should have known I'd work it out. Now, step aside.
textByHash.0dc657c37cece0d7b95d859a5162cb4885db894b: We stand before the most important, the most significant, the most powerful artefact to ever be discovered in Gielinor, and it's all thanks to me!
textByHash.8936366794afcfa2af57e4bb0c60508be5f5dddc: With the patience of a thousand men, I have spent my life following the smallest of clues and the slightest of hints to discover only the most minute inkling of its existence!
textByHash.f7a626ac2a3c30730b17897c391455584e35ed85: So yes, you will step aside, because after all I've done to get here, I have no intention of letting you stop me now!
textByHash.078cf0c268f58b356013a034fc4954f4922d9523: And what makes you think Lucien will ever lay his hands on it? He may have contributed to my research funds, certainly, but in terms of actual possession, I now hold the cards.
textByHash.b055d0ac3ac17baad9d5f735d5aa07d3d7955799: Before, yes, but now... Now the power of the Stone is in the palm of my hand. Lucien has no hope of standing against that.
textByHash.0750ac22cd8bd8c75f5543e2406bd52025939dbe: Darve, I wouldn't be too enthusiastic about tangling with our friend here. His strength is... unusual. Surely you didn't...
textByHash.351e08ffb46b86aad058b2b8af80546860ce449e: Hang on... I detect a build up of energy...
textByHash.ecd3cbf7fa6238354cb56c6658e224b4985df186: Lord Lucien! We did not expect...
textByHash.9c1a3bccaeb75fa375785932072c9bb3e14a6b2b: The discovery was made mere moments ago, my lord. Now I need time to conduct research and ensure it's safe to...
textByHash.324a512e726bcab743a7ec1562cd04e3396eaa52: Time for us to leave, Darve!
textByHash.7d9955d716f0a16ecb64b64549e8f96478db76b6: I don't know. It's giving strange readings...
textByHash.e5a0483536814f9cd67f59a0c223f688c1acf374: I'm not even sure it's working any more.
textByHash.041553948004e1d243fce8775f6fe14b2f74edc0: I am sure my triangulation calculations indicated that the source of power was in this rough area...
textByHash.e8484cf7fd4555846f8c460ec1912f30810730bd: I find it encouraging that it's pointed to somewhere where there actually are caves.
textByHash.7e50f32e1244d643dd6ef4643f4de9554997ede0: You should have more faith in my skills as a mage! I've been working on this for years-
textByHash.e6b6ef94ac866102727e0aaa49e1eec9e948cb61: That's what I like to see: a polite adventurer! Now, where was I...
textByHash.905bd2263830204fba0c1e8350da6727927dfa02: I'm sorry, but pendant or no pendant, this is a secret. I'm sure you understand.
textByHash.39a519efc45b03b6bc2d9be8042785ba9ca04750: He did not! If he had, I would be aware of it!
textByHash.c8df1b135b4c64cf98286798d2d007dfe6edac67: Well, we don't know how big this thing is. If we find it, I suppose we might need someone else to help us carry it.
textByHash.a20382aa7f079828488e508d56acef0fe3d79e88: You're not very well briefed, are you?
textByHash.90830474e36c6e8bd00c60bab0ce7db207a835f2: Lucien has asked us to search for artefacts that give off a very specific type of energy. After many years of research, I think I'm finally drawing near.
textByHash.6bb406ae877b3bd3b66a29e9414fbc700cd6a770: Bah! My detection device is totally shot. I don't understand it.
textByHash.b7ea33bec5c7cc10995ff955124624fa943015f7: I wouldn't hang around for now, adventurer. It could be a long while before I can get a clear reading.
